function.name: web_search
function.description:
Search the web for information and return relevant links.

- Primary provider: DuckDuckGo Instant Answer API (free, no API key needed)
- Fallback provider: Brave Search API (optional, for better results if BRAVE_API_KEY is set)
- Verifies each link exists before returning (HEAD request)
- Returns title, URL, and snippet for each result
- Filters out dead or inaccessible links
- Requires user approval before making web requests
- No CAPTCHA issues with API-based providers

query.description: The search query to look up on the web

max_results.description: Maximum number of verified results to return. Default: 5
